prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic studio portrait of a confident young woman in a dark luxury red-light aesthetic. Frame as a vertical close-up bust portrait, centered slightly left, with the subject facing the camera and the shoulders angled subtly. She has wet, tousled shoulder-length dark blonde hair with lighter blonde highlights, natural skin texture, softly parted lips, and a calm powerful expression. Add sleek black rectangular sunglasses with dark lenses, and dress her in a textured oversized black knit sweater. Use a nearly black deep red studio background with a dramatic crimson rim light glowing from behind and around the hair, creating vivid red edges and flyaway hair highlights. Keep the face naturally lit from the front with soft cinematic contrast, detailed pores, realistic lips, and glossy hair strands. Mood: mysterious, elegant, powerful, high-fashion editorial, dark luxury. Camera style: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face and sunglasses, rich shadows, high dynamic range, professional studio lighting, no text, no watermark, no extra objects.
